element_introduction_order.mastery_context: primary combat tool throughout early game
progressive enemy types across island crossing
powerful form with melee punch and energy wave attacks; resource-limited by hit points
high-damage AOE capability; costs hit points per use
climactic challenge requiring mastery of both Amagon and Megagon forms

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: progressive difficulty through island crossing; tension builds through enemy variety and introduces power-up relief valve (Megagon transformation) as scaling mechanic

difficulty_curve.early_game: introduction to basic rifle combat and enemy types; linear progression across island
difficulty_curve.mid_game: increasing enemy variety; introduction of Mega-Key collectible and Megagon transformation mechanic as difficulty scaling tool
difficulty_curve.late_game: Megagon form becomes critical for managing final challenges; resource management (hit points) adds complexity
notable_spikes: final boss encounter requiring mastery of both character forms

notable_level_patterns.description: Linear side-scrolling journey across island to reach rescue ship on opposite side; serves as overarching structure binding all levels
Mega-Key collectible gates access to Megagon form; transformation provides resource-based power surge (hit points scaled from Amagon score) enabling progression through harder encounters

data_quality_notes: T3 tier - source provides synopsis and gameplay mechanics but lacks granular level-by-level sequencing, exact enemy introduction order, or detailed spatial/timing patterns. Inference required for rhythm and spatial grammar elements.
